commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=382a11ed45b7117c2050f8ad15e715eac4ed2127)
commands.review_summary:
The branch pins package-publish examples to the v0.20.2 commit, adds Dependabot guidance, and automates post-release documentation updates through a new workflow, updater script, tests, and release skill.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: checkout persists the default workflow credential, the branch push occurs with that credential, and the app token is only assigned to the later PR command. The problematic case is retrying or updating an already-open generated PR.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The contributor should repair the push credential and provide a successful real workflow run; missing real-environment proof prevents an automated repair lane from completing the merge gate.

target.title: docs: recommend pinned package publish workflow
target.body:
## Summary

- update the package publish workflow example to pin the current published v0.20.2 commit SHA
- add Dependabot `github-actions` setup guidance so publishers get update PRs for newer official workflow releases
- add an automated docs-bump workflow dispatched by successful ClawHub CLI npm publishes
- add a repo-local `npm-release` skill that runs the preflight/publish flow, verifies npm/GitHub release proof, waits for the docs PR, and merges it

## Tests

- `bunx vitest run scripts/update-package-publish-workflow-docs.test.mjs src/__tests__/package-publish-workflow.test.ts`
- `tmp=$(mktemp /tmp/clawhub-cli-docs.XXXXXX.md); cp docs/cli.md "$tmp"; node scripts/update-package-publish-workflow-docs.mjs --tag v0.20.2 --docs "$tmp"; rg -n 'package-publish\.yml@' "$tmp"; rm "$tmp"`
- `bun run format:check -- .github/workflows/clawhub-cli-package-publish-docs.yml .github/workflows/clawhub-cli-npm-release.yml scripts/update-package-publish-workflow-docs.mjs scripts/update-package-publish-workflow-docs.test.mjs src/__tests__/package-publish-workflow.test.ts .agents/skills/npm-release/SKILL.md docs/cli.md packages/clawhub/README.md`
- `bunx actionlint .github/workflows/clawhub-cli-package-publish-docs.yml .github/workflows/clawhub-cli-npm-release.yml`
- `bun run ci:static`
target.author: patrick-erichsen

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
